text: Being here, I am struck by the atmosphere of curiosity and innovation. The brightly colored wall and the bold 'R+D' lettering suggest a focus on research and change—a place where boundaries between humans and machines blur and re-form. The environment feels clean, organized, almost futuristic, with a hint of sterile detachment. I sense the tension between the desire to discover and the fear of the unknown. At the same time, I feel a subtle excitement, as though each artifact and display is an invitation to contemplate the evolving relationship between humanity and technology.
